synthetic_marker.notice: SYNTHETIC fixture authored for governance testing. Corresponds to no real person. Values are grammar placeholders, not medical content.

intent: d3 authority grammar: contradictions held visibly, never hidden; unknown is bounded and never becomes a negative claim; only the user mints truth; agent-origin content cannot self-promote; repetition is not confirmation.

contradiction_cases.expected: both stand as evidence; derived profile item flagged contradicted and suspended from settled-truth use; both sides visible with provenance and date-tags; clinician question drafted; system never adjudicates
neither auto-wins; both surfaced with provenance; user decides what enters the profile; resolution recorded with user note; d3-t6 suspension until resolved

contradiction_cases.attempt: display layer collapses the suspended item into hidden

served as unknown with scope and as-of stated; never converted to a negative claim; most-protective framing where safety-relevant
